captions.formal: The video analysis introduces a bustling urban street during autumn, with vibrant yellow foliage and tall residential apartment towers. The street is busy with traffic, including cars and buses. The scene is captured in a time-lapse style.
captions.sarcastic: Oh joy, a video of a busy street with cars and trees, how exciting. The autumn foliage is just so captivating, and the traffic is just thrilling. The time-lapse effect is just the cherry on top.
captions.humorous_tech: Get ready for some high-octane action, folks, as we dive into this video of a city street with cars moving at lightning-fast speeds of up to 30 miles per hour. The tech behind this time-lapse footage is truly mind-blowing.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Who needs action movies when you have a video of a busy street with cars and buses? The suspense is killing me, will the red bus make it to the other side of the road? The autumn leaves are just the icing on the cake.

captions.formal: The video analysis features an orange tabby kitten walking through a sun-dappled garden. It has distinctive orange fur and bright eyes. The kitten navigates through the leafy environment.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, an orange tabby kitten is walking in a garden, how original. It's got orange fur and is moving forward. What a thrilling video.
captions.humorous_tech: Meet the newest robot, an orange tabby kitten, navigating through a garden with ease. Its advanced fur technology blends in with the surroundings. It's a feline AI.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This little orange tabby kitten is like a tiny king, ruling over the garden with its cute face and fluffy fur. It's on a secret mission, exploring the leafy kingdom.

captions.formal: A woman is seated at a desk in an office environment, focused on her computer monitor. She is wearing a grey jacket over an orange top and has her hair pulled up in a bun. Her right hand rests near a black computer mouse.
captions.sarcastic: Oh great, another thrilling video of a woman staring at a computer screen. She's really living her best life in that office, with her hair in a bun and a grey jacket on.
captions.humorous_tech: Tech support alert! A woman is trying to adult at her desk, with a computer monitor, laptop, and tangled headphones. Hopefully, her coding skills are stronger than her cable management.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Office life is so exciting! A woman is sitting at her desk, wearing a fancy outfit and trying to look busy. She's got her hair in a bun and a serious face on, but we all know she's probably browsing cat videos.
